entries.title: runtime_lock_holder has no TTL/stale-holder recovery — crashed CLI leaves a permanent lock
entries.fix_note: T4 stale recovery: acquire_runtime_lock with force_stale=true + TTL env override + is_lock_stale check in patch_work early-exit

entries.title: creator works handle_status duplicates ~200 lines from removed run.rs Status handler
entries.closure_note: V1.42 P-last T3: deduplicated handle_status by extracting shared display helpers (print_chapter_table, print_completion_lock_hint, truncate_with_ellipsis). Line count reduced, no logic change.

entries.title: WorkPatch has 30 Option fields — consider builder pattern for future maintainability
entries.closure_note: V1.42 P-last T1: waived — builder pattern is a code quality improvement, not user-facing. All current callers construct WorkPatch correctly. Defer to V1.43+.

entries.title: No CLI->daemon integration test for creator works use / completion-lock release (only contract --help tests)
entries.scope: crates/nexus42/tests/integration/ (does not exist); need an end-to-end CLI test against running daemon
entries.closure_note: V1.44 P3 T2: added hermetic CLI surface tests in crates/nexus42/tests/creator_works.rs (7 tests covering works use, completion-lock help text, required-argument validation, and subcommand enumeration). Commit d5ebbe6c.

entries.title: --from-work + --reopen + --extend-chapters combined path not implemented (only each in isolation)
entries.closure_note: V1.44 P-last formal close (V1.44 compass §1.6 P3 whitelist: waived items confirmed waived; deferred to next iteration if re-opened). See .mstar/plans/2026-06-13-v1.44-author-desk-residual-convergence.md §2.

entries.title: works status does not show on-disk missing-file hint for completion-lock (DB SSOT only)
entries.closure_note: V1.42 P-last T2: added on-disk missing-file hint in handle_status for completion-locked novel works. Shows '⚠ completion-lock file missing' when DB column is set but .completion-lock.json is absent.

entries.title: No DB+file reconciliation helper when completion-lock file is missing but DB column is set (covered by fix wave W1/F-005)
WorkRef::new(validated) newtype to centralize path-traversal defense (defense-in-depth)
entries.closure_note: V1.42 P-last T1: waived — defense-in-depth newtype; no user-facing impact. Current validation in callers is sufficient for pre-1.0 local-first. Defer to V1.43+.

entries.title: Verify partial index on novel_pool_entries is used by pool queries via EXPLAIN QUERY PLAN when DF-61 ships
entries.scope: crates/nexus-local-db/src/ (future pool queries) + migration 202606100002 partial index

entries.title: repeated_sweeps_remain_stable test is timing-flaky (2/3 failures locally); pre-existing, not introduced by V1.41
entries.source: qc3 S2 (V1.41 P0 review); qc-consolidated.md; pre-existing from V1.39 P4

entries.title: WorkSummary list view omits completion_locked_at (UX choice; CLI list won't show lock state at a glance)
entries.closure_note: V1.42 P-last T2: added completion_locked_at to WorkSummary struct and list query. CLI handle_list now shows lock icon in status column when locked.

entries.title: .sqlx/ offline cache not fully refreshed for 5 new columns + novel_pool_entries (sqlx-cli unavailable during implement)
